costs_slippage.method: Subtract one_way_turnover * bps/10000 from replayed daily portfolio returns.

data.price_adjustment_note: qfa AlpacaGateway stock bars request; no explicit adjusted-price flag exposed.
data.source: Alpaca real market data via qfa AlpacaGateway

decision_rationale: Median random-window Sharpe after 10 bps costs is the primary falsifier; redundancy improvement is judged from retained stream correlations where available. Severe drawdown or non-positive median Sharpe implies rejection.

divergent_child_idea.rationale: Different driver from momentum/correlation: macro surprise plus drawdown-state allocation.
divergent_child_idea.title: Defensive ETF allocation using macro surprise and realized drawdown state

orthogonality_checks.method: Pearson correlation of AR-051 10bps cost-adjusted daily returns versus retained qfa equity curves where available; generate_signals also applies a trailing proxy correlation penalty.

random_period_protocol.method: Eight deterministic pseudo-random subwindows across 2023-2025; each run through qfa with Alpaca data and no --data-csv, then externally cost-adjusted at 10 bps and 20 bps one-way.

refinement_child_idea.rationale: Only if controller accepts watchlist continuation; tune correlation target on held-out returns rather than proxy overlap.
refinement_child_idea.title: Out-of-sample ETF orthogonal rotation with learned correlation target
